# Beauty & Wellness.

Enjoy anywhere.

Book online.

Explore a variety of beauty and wellness services at jeff, with expert professionals offering convenient mobile treatments. Our user-friendly online booking ensures a hassle-free experience. Discover personalized treatments today in the comfort of your chosen location.

 Behandlung finden 

![Image 3: Woman browses jeff treatments on her phone](https://ik.imagekit.io/jeffservices/tag_images/massageoil/1200.jpg?tr=w-600)

## How it works

###### Pick a treatment

Choose from over 50 treatments. From massages to pedicures, there is the right beauty & wellness treatment for everyone.

###### Choose your expert

Browse profiles of qualified, insured beauty & wellness experts.

###### Book your appointment

Request your appointment online. Our experts are also available on weekends.

Discover our most popular treatments.

## Frequently asked questions

## How does jeff work?

jeff is an on-demand booking service dedicated to providing beauty & wellness treatments in the convenience of your home, office or hotel. We offer several treatments from hand-picked therapists that advertiser their services on our platform. Our simple booking technology allows customers to book their appointments online.

## How can I book a treatment?

In order to find therapists in your area, type in your city. You will get an overview of all therapists and treatments in your area and can directly request an appointment at a time convenient for you.

## How do you choose your specialists?

We only work with the best therapists who have extensive experience in their field and the necessary qualifications. We want to make sure that you can relax knowing that you are in safe hands.

## How do I pay?

You can pay by debit or credit card on the website. All payments are made securely through Stripe. For some therapists you can also select cash payment and settle the amount in cash directly with your therapist after your treatment.

## What is your cancellation policy?

If something comes up, you can reschedule or cancel your booking free of charge up to 24 hours before the appointment. Bookings canceled less than 24 hours before the scheduled appointment will incur a 100% charge.

## Can I pay with a health insurance prescription?

No, as our services are cosmetic treatments, we regret to inform you that we cannot accept health insurance prescriptions.

[You have further questions about our company? Then feel free to contact us. We will help you.](https://jeff.services/en/about_us)
